'''Vultar the Ugly''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] criminal killed by cyborg [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Gorm (cyborg)|Gorm the Dissolver]] many years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="FF">{{FactFile|116|GOR 1-2|Gorm the Dissolver}}</ref> Gorm removed Vultar's left forearm and grafted it onto his own body.<ref name="TEGtD-Gorm">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

{{Char-stub}}
